name: cross-review-bridge
description: Codex Desktop Pro review workflows for browser handoff, review ZIP packaging, and feedback integration.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-check work through ChatGPT Pro from Codex Desktop.
interface.longDescription: Prepare compact local briefs, build self-contained Pro review ZIP packages, route review work through ChatGPT web in the Codex Desktop in-app browser with user approval, then classify and verify external feedback before applying it. This is the in-app browser variant, not a generic Chrome-profile or ChatGPT desktop GUI handoff. API-backed review is outside the default workflow unless explicitly requested.
defaultPrompt: Use Cross Review Bridge through ChatGPT web.
Use Pro Review Package Handoff to build a review ZIP.
Use External Feedback Integrator to classify Pro review feedback.
